payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Partial/cropped view of a rectangular blue rug with multicolored floral and medallion motifs (cream, red, yellow) on a medium pile, wool-like texture; the near corner and border sit on hardwood flooring and the rug is cut off by the image edge, photographed at close range (~0.8 m).
